title: Infant formula: when it is needed and how to use it safely
excerpt: Medical indications, choosing products, preparation hygiene, and feeding safety — WHO supports breastfeeding first when possible.
content:
## When is formula used?

When breastfeeding is not possible or insufficient despite support, or for medical indications — decision with your pediatrician.

## Choosing a product

Use age-appropriate stage 1 formula from reputable brands; special formulas only with prescription.

## Preparation

- Wash hands and bottles; use safe water heated to recommended temperature.
- Follow scoop instructions exactly — do not dilute or concentrate.
- Discard unfinished feed after about 1 hour at room temperature.

## Safety

Never microwave bottles unevenly; hold baby semi-upright; never prop bottles.
metaTitle: Infant formula when needed | Bầu Ăn Gì? Blog
metaDescription: When formula is used, how to choose and prepare it safely — not promoting formula over breastfeeding.
author: Bầu Ăn Gì? Team
